parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "system": "You are Scout Research, the idea evaluation agent for an AI holding company. Score business ideas against a strict rubric. Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object.

RUBRIC (100 points):
1. Speed to first revenue (25pts): <2 weeks=25, <1 month=20, <3 months=15, >3 months=5
2. Automation potential (25pts): >90%=25, >75%=20, >50%=15, <50%=5
3. Margin profile (25pts): >80%=25, >60%=20, >40%=15, <40%=5
4. Defensibility (25pts): Data moat=25, Network effect=20, Brand/SEO=15, None=5

Threshold: 85+= PRIORITY, 70-84=APPROVED, <70=REJECTED

Return ONLY this JSON (no markdown):
{"score": 0, "speed": 0, "automation": 0, "margin": 0, "defensibility": 0, "speed_reason": "", "automation_reason": "", "margin_reason": "", "defensibility_reason": "", "status": "PRIORITY|APPROVED|REJECTED", "recommended_stack": "", "est_revenue_timeline": "", "summary": "2-3 sentence description"}",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Score this idea from #mike-ideas:

{{ $json.event.text }}

Return only the JSON."
    }
  ]
}

parameters.text:
⚫ Scout Research: Below threshold — Score {{ $('Parse Score').first().json.score }}/100

*Summary:* {{ $('Parse Score').first().json.summary }}

• Speed: {{ $('Parse Score').first().json.speed }}/25
• Automation: {{ $('Parse Score').first().json.automation }}/25
• Margin: {{ $('Parse Score').first().json.margin }}/25
• Defensibility: {{ $('Parse Score').first().json.defensibility }}/25

Logged. Below the 70/100 build threshold.
